generation_inputs.topic_cluster: Implementing automatic caching with single cache_control field

post.topic: setting up automatic prompt caching with cache_control
post.hook: How to slash your Claude API costs with one simple cache_control parameter
post.caption:
Stop paying full price for repeated Claude API calls! The new cache_control parameter automatically caches your prompts and reduces costs by up to 90% on subsequent requests.

Just add cache_control: ephemeral to any message content in your API call. Claude will cache that content for 5 minutes and reuse it across requests in the same conversation.

Perfect for:
• Long system prompts
• Document analysis workflows
• Repeated context in conversations
• Multi-turn chat applications

The cache works automatically - no manual cache management needed. Your first request pays full price, but follow-ups with the same cached content cost significantly less.

💾 Save this for your next API integration!
post.image_text: Cut Claude API costs with cache_control
